title: Freshly Roasted Italian Vegetable Frittata
description: A hearty Italian dish featuring roasted vegetables and creamy eggs, perfect for a post-workout meal. This flexitarian-friendly frittata is cooked to perfection in a comal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the sliced zucchini, bell peppers, and chopped onion with olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20 minutes, or until tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Add the minced garlic and shredded parmesan cheese to the bowl and whisk until combined.
Add the roasted vegetables to the bowl and stir until they are evenly distributed.
Heat the comal over medium heat and add a small amount of olive oil to the surface.
Pour the egg mixture into the comal and cook until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the frittata towards the center.
Continue cooking the frittata for an additional 5 minutes, or until the eggs are almost set.
Use the spatula to carefully slide the frittata out of the comal onto a plate.
